extensionDescription.message: Adds useful floating buttons to GitHub and GitHub Enterprise pages for pull requests, scrolling, reviews, and merging.

toastPrOnly.message: Only available on Pull Request pages.

toastReviewBtnNotFound.message: Review button not found. GitHub's page structure may have changed.

toastApproveRadioNotFound.message: Approve option not found. Leaving the review panel open.

toastSubmitNotFound.message: Submit button not found. Please submit manually.

toastMergeStrategyNotFound.message: Merge strategy option not found. GitHub's page structure may have changed.

toastMergeStrategyUnavailable.message: Cannot select a merge strategy. Check the repository settings.

toastMergeBtnNotFound.message: Merge button not found. The PR may already be merged or cannot be merged.

toastMergeNotReady.message: Cannot merge (Draft, conflict, branch protection, etc.).

noMessages.message: No messages added. Please add at least one.

minOneMessage.message: At least one message is required.

permissionDenied.message: Permission denied. Host was not added.

pageSubtitle.message: Enable or disable floating buttons in the bottom-right corner, reorder them, and register GitHub Enterprise hosts.

hintButtons.message: Use checkboxes to enable or disable, drag (⠿), or use ↑/↓ to reorder.

hintReview.message: Choose how the "Open PR review panel" button behaves.

radioApproveDesc.message: (selects Approve, enters a comment, and submits)

hintApproveComments.message: One message is picked at random when auto-approve submits.

hintEnterprise.message: e.g. github.mycompany.com — adding a host will request permission for that site. github.com is supported by default.
